phonetic: 藢蓴藧胃蓹蕣藞f蓹蕣t蓹蕣
examples: Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar is an effective technique to get Digital Elevation Model and orthophoto map.
This paper describes a method for orthophoto updating rapidly based on a local interest area in the case of rapid topographic support.
Thus, the paper gives the the concept of corresponding digital orthophoto map applying to stereo scene, and discusses the theory, characteristic, production and application in city management.
